title: Betssons vd pressas om Turkiet: ”Kan inte svara”
summary_md:
# Betssons vd pressas om Turkiet: ”Kan inte svara”

**Feed**: dagen-med-di  
**Published**: 2026-04-24  
**Market Sentiment**: Mixed

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

The episode is an interview with Betsson CEO Pontus Lindvall following a full Q1 report that came after a recent profit warning. While B2C operations show strong, record-level growth, B2B revenue collapsed due to one significant customer losing business in its market, dragging the operating margin down from ~21% to 11.9%. Hosts repeatedly press the CEO on Turkey exposure and transparency, but he declines to disclose B2B customer details, citing contractual confidentiality.

---

## Universe Stocks

### 🟠 BETS-B — Betsson | **WATCH** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Mixed | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 50%

Strong B2C growth offset by B2B collapse (one customer -43%); margin down from ~21% to 11.9%; opacity around high-margin Turkey B2B revenue creates uncertainty.

#### Reasoning

Betsson's core B2C business is growing strongly with record figures, but the high-margin B2B segment — speculated to be heavily tied to Turkey via a Malta entity — has deteriorated sharply as a major customer lost revenue in its market. The CEO cannot or will not clarify Turkey exposure, regulatory drivers, or what margins would look like without B2B, leaving investors with limited visibility. Stabilisation reported since end of Q4, but the dependence on an opaque, possibly regulatory-sensitive 

#### Sell Triggers

- if the major B2B customer's revenue declines further
- if Turkey B2B revenue is lost to regulation
- if B2C growth stalls and can no longer offset B2B weakness
- if margins fail to recover from the 11.9% level

> *"Marknaden antar då att de här B2B-intäkterna kommer från Turkiet. Men som jag förstår det så kan du heller inte svara på hur stor del av intäkterna som kommer från Turkiet. Nej, det kan jag inte svara på."*

---
